_meta.purpose: Adjudicate flagged dedup cases and identify property_suffixes gaps

suspect_miskey.evidence: Boolean type, ToggleControl, no description; only on sgs/label. Emits max-width constraint, not a CSS property value. Name is a behaviour toggle that gates whether an element stretches to full width or hugs its content.

Boolean type, ToggleControl; explicit description: 'When true the in-body trial tag stretches to full width (block, 100%) instead of hugging its text.' This is a behaviour toggle on sgs/product-card, not a CSS width value assignment.

Boolean type, role=behaviour (explicitly marked), no control (likely server-only). Present on 4 blocks (container, cta-section, hero, trust-bar) where SVG backgrounds are a feature. Name is a gate/toggle that enables text-shadow on SVG layers, not a shadow property value.

Boolean type, role=colour-gradient, no control. Present on 4 blocks (container, cta-section, hero, trust-bar). Name signals a toggle that enables/disables a gradient overlay layer, not the gradient value itself. The gradient properties are separate (overlayGradientColor, etc.).
Boolean type, role=behaviour (explicitly marked), ToggleControl, only on sgs/counter. This is a toggle that gates whether the accent colour is applied to a stroke, not a stroke property value.

group_a.semantic: Identity icon (entity identifier, not a Lucide icon)

group_b.semantic: Lucide icon slug (a specific icon from the Lucide library)

possible_splits.evidence: Same attr name, but different roles and blocks. sgs/cart and sgs/notice-banner use iconName to reference generic identity icons (cart icon, notice icon). sgs/icon uses iconName to select from Lucide's 1963 icon library. These are semantically distinct: one is an entity identifier, the other is a library selector. Merging would hide the semantic difference and break the per-block icon resolution. Keep as two separate settings with different roles.

These are the SAME setting across device tiers. The base form `positionX` has `canonical_slot` set correctly; the responsive variants `positionXMobile` and `positionXTablet` should also have `canonical_slot=positionX` set in the DB. The split is a data-integrity bug (incomplete slot assignment), not a semantic difference. All three attrs should resolve to `slot:positionX`. This is a DB backfill job: set `canonical_slot='positionX'` on the mobile/tablet variants in block_attributes.

property_suffixes_additions.note: Grid layout property for row track sizing; already has GridTemplateColumns in suffixes, this is the row equivalent.
Grid auto row sizing; companion to GridAutoColumns (already in map).
Hover-state text decoration (underline toggle). Not responsive; block-specific hover control.
Generic vertical-align property for alignment controls; already have HorizontalAlignment, this is the pair.

unresolved_bucketing.rule: Only CSS properties (n≈41) require shared-control standardisation via property_suffixes. Content, behaviour, media, and enum-select attributes (n≈282) are legitimately block-specific and DO NOT need a shared control spec — they're working as-is.

css_properties.note: These SHOULD resolve to a CSS property in property_suffixes. Many are actual CSS properties with a few data gaps (GridTemplateRows, GridAutoRows, etc.). No shared control spec needed — property_suffixes handles them. ~4 high-priority additions identified above.

content_text_attributes.note: Block-specific text content (placeholder strings, help text, labels, SVG markup). All are per-block-unique and belong in each block's edit.js. No shared TextContentControl needed. These are working as-is.

behaviour_toggles.note: Boolean toggles that enable/disable features (form field required, hover scale, carousel dots). All are per-block-specific behaviour gates. No shared BehaviourToggleControl needed. The 5 SUSPECT_MISKEY cases above belong here, not in CSS properties.

enum_select_controls.note: Enum selectors for mode/style/type choices (inherit-style, connector-style, framing-mode). All are per-block-specific; no shared EnumSelectControl needed. Already expose via block's own SelectControl in edit.js. These are working as-is.

media_urls_assets.note: URLs, file paths, asset references. All are per-block-specific; no shared MediaPicker or URLControl needed (or they already have MediaUploadCheck). These are working as-is.

other_unclassified.note: Misc per-block attributes (event routing, link behaviour, carousel tuning, menu fallback). All are block-specific or event-wired. No shared control spec needed. These are working as-is.

spot_checks.reason: No hyphen; likely a dimension value (border thickness, line thickness) used in a block-specific way, not a standard CSS property name. Working as-is.
Links an entire block to a URL. Per-block feature, not a CSS property. Working as-is.
Tuning parameter for carousel animation speed. Per-block specific, not CSS. Working as-is.
Boolean flag for whether audio player UI controls are shown. Per-block media setting, not CSS. Working as-is.
Selects animation type for SVG backgrounds. Per-block feature, not CSS. Working as-is.
Selects style inheritance mode for a block element. Per-block enum, not CSS. Working as-is.
Attribution/credit HTML element tag choice. Per-block content, not CSS. Working as-is.
Selects how to frame/present product value. Per-block mode selector. Working as-is.

summary.bucketing_consensus: Only ~41 unresolved attrs (CSS properties + gaps) need property_suffixes work. The remaining ~282 are legitimately block-specific and do NOT require shared control specs.

recommendations: Add 4 property_suffixes rows: GridTemplateRows→grid-template-rows, GridAutoRows→grid-auto-rows, TextDecorationHover→text-decoration, VerticalAlignment→vertical-align.
Split 5 SUSPECT_MISKEY attrs out of CSS property groups into behaviour:* settings. These are all toggles/gates, not property values.
Merge positionX / positionY: backfill canonical_slot on positionXMobile and positionYTablet in the DB, then re-run build-setting-types.py.
Keep iconName split (identity vs icon-lucide): different roles, different semantics, no merge.

Do NOT add shared control specs for content, behaviour, media, or enum-select unresolved attrs. They're working as block-specific implementations. Focus effort on the CSS property map closure (~41 attrs).
